text.title: Accessibility-First Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: What stage is the design at?

conclusion.verdict: apply this methodology; bake constraints into tokens
route to accessibility-evaluation for remediation audit
use a focused contrast checker only

example.trace: greenfield component-library rework → token-encoded-contrast → tokens audited + reduced-motion variants baked

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
